data.title: Upbit launches BERA KRW, BTC, USDT trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Upbit will launch BERA Korean Won, BTC, and USDT trading pairs at 22:00 on February 6, and deposits and withdrawals will be open at 21:00 on February 6. Please note that if liquidity is insufficient, the trading time may be adjusted. Deposits and withdrawals only support the Berachain network and must be made through a personal wallet address with ownership verification. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$114.706 billion, with a cumulative net inflow of US$40.67 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 5, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 66.3761 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a net outflow of 0.00 US dollars per day, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is 21.864 billion US dollars. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a net outflow of 0.00 US dollars per day, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is 1.232 billion US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of 44.3523 million US dollars per day, and the current historical total net inflow of IBIT reached 40.773 billion US dollars. The second is WisdomTree ETF BTCW, with a single-day net inflow of $11.3782 million. Currently, BTCW's total net inflow has reached $258 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $114.706 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 5.95%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $40.67 billion.

data.title: Upbit to launch JTO, SCR Bitcoin and USDT trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Upbit will launch Jito (JTO), Scroll (SCR) Bitcoin and USDT trading pairs.

data.title: Jupiter X Account Accessed by U.S. IP Amid Staff Emergency
data.description: According to Foresight News, Jupiter founder Meow announced on Twitter that the Jupiter X account was accessed by a U.S. IP address. The operational staff member, Mei, is currently unreachable as she is returning to Singapore from Mountain Dao due to a family emergency. Meow has requested assistance in locating Mei or understanding the situation.

data.title: Ripple's XRP could see a recovery as SEC scales down Crypto Enforcement unit
data.description:
XRP is down 3% in the early hours of Thursday as crypto community members anticipate that the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) appeal of the ruling in its case with Ripple will likely not stand following latest developments under the new administration.
source: https://www.fxstreet.com/cryptocurrencies/news/can-xrp-bounce-back-sec-actions-may-favor-ripple-in-ongoing-appeal-202502060245

data.title: Lawyer’s Perspective: SEC’s Proposed Retroactive Token Issuance Relief Measures May Benefit Utility Tokens and Projects
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Franco Jofré, lawyer and senior counsel at Miller & Chevalier, said that the retroactive token issuance relief measures proposed by U.S. SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce may benefit cryptocurrency companies and projects with specific characteristics.
Jofré added that projects that demonstrate strong practical use cases for tokens, rather than purely investment-focused speculative tools, may be eligible for potential relief. "If the SEC provides relief, it may introduce clearer standards to distinguish between security tokens and true utility tokens. For example, tokens issued primarily for access to services or platforms, or those that are structured more like digital commodities than equity substitutes."
These include DeFi projects, L2 expansion solutions, and other crypto infrastructures that use tokens for governance and security. The lawyer also said that custodians and centralized exchanges are also worthy of attention.
In addition, Jofré and Eli Cohen, general counsel of RWA tokenization platform Centrifuge, said that the SEC has every right to dismiss its lawsuit against cryptocurrency companies for allegedly offering unregistered securities. He added that if the SEC redefines the standards for securities issuance or adopts a new approach to interpreting initial token sales, there will be a greater chance that pending lawsuits will be dismissed.
In addition, Jofré said that the SEC may decide not to provide retroactive relief to cryptocurrency companies at all, but only focus on providing forward-looking relief.
Consensys lawyer Bill Hughes said that the regulatory approach taken by the new leadership of the SEC is refreshing, but it will take some time to implement changes. He urged the industry to be patient and wait for the new leadership to adapt to its role. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: LBank launches Supa Pump (SUPA)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank launched Supa Pump (SUPA) at 12:30 (SGT) on February 6, and opened the SUPA/USDT trading pair. The deposit business was developed at 12:00 on February 6, and the withdrawal business will be opened at 12:00 on February 7.

data.title: Thailand International Digital Business and Financial Center Appoints Movement Co-founder and Two Other Crypto Industry Professionals as Advisors
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Wai Man Raymond Chu, director of the Thailand International Digital Business and Financial Center (TIDC), announced the appointment of crypto industry figures Tekin Salimi and Rushi Manche as advisors to the center. This strategic move highlights TIDC's commitment to developing the country's blockchain and stablecoin infrastructure, promoting cryptocurrency adoption, and building a team to drive Thailand's digital economy. The addition of these two experts is expected to provide guidance and support for the center's initiatives.
TIDC is an important collaboration supported by Thailand's Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (MDES) and National Telecommunications Public Company Limited (NT) to cultivate a digital-first ecosystem, attract digital business investment, and promote the development of digital innovation in Thailand.
According to reports, Tekin Salimi is an entrepreneur, venture capitalist, and former lawyer who founded the cryptocurrency asset management fund dao5, which manages more than $500 million in assets.
Rushi Manche is the co-founder of Movement Labs, a blockchain development company dedicated to improving the security and efficiency of blockchain networks.

data.title: Thailand's TIDC Appoints New Advisors to Boost Digital Economy
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Thailand International Digital Business and Financial Center (TIDC) has appointed Tekin Salimi and Rushi Manche as advisors. This strategic move underscores TIDC's commitment to enhancing the country's blockchain and stablecoin infrastructure, promoting cryptocurrency adoption, and building a team to advance Thailand's digital economy. The expertise of these two professionals is expected to guide and support the center's initiatives.

TIDC is a significant collaboration supported by Thailand's Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (MDES) and National Telecom Public Company Limited (NT). It aims to foster a digital-first ecosystem, attract digital business investments, and drive digital innovation in Thailand.

Tekin Salimi is an entrepreneur, venture capitalist, and former lawyer who founded the cryptocurrency asset management fund dao5, which manages assets exceeding $500 million. Rushi Manche is the co-founder of Movement Labs, a blockchain development company focused on enhancing the security and efficiency of blockchain networks.
